title: sonic-kb verification council log record
description: One JSONL record per council finding (review/council-log.jsonl). All tiers log to the same file so trend review works across tiers.

ts.description: When the record was appended (stamped by the caller; workflow scripts have no clock)

run_id.description: Workflow run id (wf_...) or 'tier0-interactive' for inline single-agent checks

tier.description: 0 = interactive question (one routed agent), 1 = content entering the KB, 2 = deliberate audit / dispute

content_file.description: Repo-relative path of the content under review (e.g. knowledge-base/code-paths/vlan-create.json)

claim.description: The candidate assertion verified (null for whole-checks and extra concerns)

claim_type.description: Claim type; routing key to the domain agent

agent.description: Which council member produced the verdict. Members differ by evidence source: config=db_schemas.json, architecture=build/repos clones, rfc=protocol specs, logic=internal reasoning only

verdict.description: match/partial/mismatch/underivable = blind-rederive diff; pass/fail = whole-check; concern = fault-finder extra

evidence.description: Grounding the deriving agent used (file:line, RFC section, schema table.field)

score.description: Fault-finder scoring. Severity above 'minor' requires evidence (file:line / RFC section / schema field).

blind_breach.description: True if the derive agent consulted the candidate content despite the blind protocol (after one retry); its derivation was discarded and the verdict forced to 'underivable'

escalation_outcome.description: Tier 2 only. confirmed = independent re-exam + adjudication upheld the fault; disputed = standing disagreement after one capped round (valid terminal state, surfaced to user)
